=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/multipleCatchTag_preview.ts(12,3): warning TS377092: These 2 consecutive `catchTag` transformations can be collapsed into a single `catchTags` call. effect(multipleCatchTag)


==== /.src/multipleCatchTag_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics multipleCatchTag:warning
    import { Data, Effect, pipe } from "effect"
    
    class NotFound extends Data.TaggedError("NotFound")<{}> {}
    class Unauthorized extends Data.TaggedError("Unauthorized")<{}> {}
    
    declare const program: Effect.Effect<string, NotFound | Unauthorized>
    
    export const preview = pipe(
      program,
      Effect.catchTag("NotFound", () => Effect.succeed("missing")),
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377092: These 2 consecutive `catchTag` transformations can be collapsed into a single `catchTags` call. effect(multipleCatchTag)
!!! related TS377093 /.src/multipleCatchTag_preview.ts(13,3): This `catchTag` transformation is part of a consecutive chain that can be collapsed into `catchTags`. effect(multipleCatchTag)
      Effect.catchTag("Unauthorized", () => Effect.succeed("denied"))
    )
